fiveStar.name: Light Up Your World
fiveStar.skill:
Increase Attack by 30.0%/30.0%/39.0%/39.0%/48.0%/48.0%/57.0%.
Increase party's critical damage by 18.1%/23.5%/23.5%/28.9%/28.9%/34.3%/34.3%. For each Track gained, increase party's critical damage by 3.0%/3.9%/3.9%/4.8%/4.8%/5.7%/5.7% more for 3 turns. Stacks up to 3 times.
When Virtual Concert is active, gain Skill Amplification equal to 10.0%/13.0%/13.0%/16.0%/16.0%/19.0%/19.0%.
